sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30329" key="e)gkluste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγ-κλυστέον</orth>, <sense id="n30329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must give a douche</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
